bead.title: test: cite existing backend STP coverage
bead.description:
Context: Many STP rows are marked `UNCITED_COVERAGE`: passing backend tests already exercise the behavior but lack canonical `@covers` tags. Convert existing backend evidence to executable traceability without inventing new behavior. Focus on GraphQL/MCP/policy/intent backend tests named in STP-101 through STP-109 and STP-108.

In-scope files: `crates/axon-server/tests/graphql_policy_contract.rs`, `crates/axon-server/tests/graphql_intents_contract.rs`, `crates/axon-server/tests/mcp_contract.rs`, `crates/axon-server/tests/mcp_intents_contract.rs`, and direct shared helpers only if needed for naming.
Out-of-scope: writing new tests for rows currently marked `UNTESTED`; do not mark unproven rows covered.
Implementation hint: add comments or test-name annotations using exact `@covers US-...-AC...` syntax where the assertion already exists, then update STP row status only when scanner evidence exists.
bead.acceptance:
1. The executable @covers scanner reports backend citations for the STP rows changed in this bead.
2. `cargo test -p axon-server --test graphql_policy_contract` passes.
3. `cargo test -p axon-server --test graphql_intents_contract` passes.
4. `cargo test -p axon-server --test mcp_contract` passes.
5. `cargo test -p axon-server --test mcp_intents_contract` passes.
